rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Educ. Code §30.022, which governs the board composition and operations of the Texas School for the Blind and Visually Impaired.
quote: Sec. 30.022. GOVERNANCE OF THE TEXAS SCHOOL FOR THE BLIND AND VISUALLY IMPAIRED.
_note: No overlap between proposed property tax exemption change and this statute governing the School for the Blind.
